heading: National policy with respect to museums as educational institutions
label: 1221–2 National policy with respect to museums as educational institutions
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of Education Amendments of 1974, and not as part of General Education Provisions Act which comprises this chapter.
Effective DateSection effective on and after sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 21, 1974section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380section 1221–1 of this title
amendments: CodificationSection was enacted as part of Education Amendments of 1974, and not as part of General Education Provisions Act which comprises this chapter.

children.text: that museums serve as sources for schools in providing education for children,
that museums provide educational services of various kinds for educational agencies and institutions and institutions of higher education, and
that the expense of the educational services provided by museums is seldom borne by the educational agencies and institutions taking advantage of the museums’ resources,
